# Contributing to Sensible-Analytics

Thank you for considering contributing to Sensible-Analytics! We welcome contributions from the community.

## How to Contribute

There are many ways to contribute to Sensible-Analytics:

1. **Report bugs** - Help us improve by reporting issues you find
2. **Suggest features** - Share your ideas for new features or improvements
3. **Improve documentation** - Help make our docs clearer and more comprehensive
4. **Submit code changes** - Fix bugs or add new features through pull requests
5. **Help others** - Answer questions and help fellow contributors

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repository you want to contribute to
2. Create a new branch for your changes: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name`
3. Make your changes following our coding standards
4. Add or update tests as needed
5. Ensure all tests pass
6. Commit your changes: `git commit -m "feat: brief description of changes"`
7. Push to your fork: `git push origin feature/your-feature-name`
8. Open a pull request against the main branch

## Development Setup

To set up your development environment:

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/Sensible-Analytics/<repository-name>.git
cd <repository-name>

# Install dependencies
npm install  # or yarn install

# Run development server
npm run dev  # or as specified in the repository's README
```

## Coding Standards

We follow these general principles:

- Write clear, maintainable code
- Follow the existing code style in the repository
- Write meaningful commit messages
- Add tests for new functionality
- Update documentation when appropriate
- Keep pull requests focused on a single concern

## Pull Request Process

1. Ensure your code passes all tests and linting
2. Update the README.md if needed with changes
3. Your pull request will be reviewed by maintainers
4. Address any feedback from reviewers
5. Once approved, your changes will be merged

## Reporting Bugs

When reporting bugs, please include:
- A clear and descriptive title
- Steps to reproduce the issue
- Expected behavior vs actual behavior
- Screenshots or screen recordings if applicable
- Environment details (OS, browser version, etc.)

## Suggesting Features

When suggesting features, please include:
- A clear description of the feature and its purpose
- Why this feature would be valuable to users
- Any potential implementation considerations
- Examples of how the feature would be used

## License

By contributing to Sensible-Analytics, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the same license as the project.

## Questions?

If you have any questions about contributing, please open an issue or reach out to our maintainers.

Happy coding! 🚀
